issues.description: Action type 'GiveDon' is incorrect. Text says 'Set up to 3 of your DON!! cards as active', which means activating/resting existing DON cards, not giving new ones. Should use 'Rest' with target scope for your own DON cards, or a similar mechanic. 'GiveDon' adds DON to a card/leader, not activates existing DON.
Missing condition/action for 'you cannot play Character cards during this turn'. This is a restriction that should be represented as a condition or separate action limiting play during the turn.
Target 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' is incorrect. Text specifies 'up to 1 of your opponent's cards' (any card type, not just Characters). Should be 'ChooseOpponentCard' or similar broader scope.

suggestedDsl.effectText:
[On Play] Set up to 3 of your DON!! cards as active. Then, you cannot play Character cards during this turn.
[On K.O.] Rest up to 1 of your opponent's cards.
